title: Add internal test mode with three test profiles for pattern verification

requirements.text: Create backend test functions in main.mo that generate three test profiles: (1) Healthy User with all section scores in 30-40 range and no medical history, (2) Moderate Issues user with scores in 21-30 range and 'BP' medical history, (3) Serious Concerns user with scores in 0-20 range and 'Sugar, BP' medical history. Each profile must have realistic score patterns automatically generated across all 40 questions based on the profile type.

quotes: Test Data: 3 अलग प्रोफाइल (Healthy, Moderate, Serious) बनाएं, जिसमें BP और Sugar जैसी Medical History भी शामिल हो।
Medical Values: 'BP' और 'Sugar' शब्द ही इस्तेमाल करें।
Scores: प्रोफाइल टाइप के हिसाब से ऑटोमैटिक रियलिस्टिक पैटर्न्स जेनरेट कराएं।

acceptanceCriteria: Three distinct test profile functions exist in backend that return complete WellnessReport data structures
Healthy profile generates scores between 30-40 for all sections with empty medical history
Moderate profile generates scores between 21-30 with 'BP' as medical history value
Serious profile generates scores between 0-20 with 'Sugar, BP' as medical history values
Score patterns are realistic and consistent with the profile type across all 40 questions

requirements.text: Add backend verification functions that process each test profile through the pattern analysis engine and log complete results to console, including detected low-scoring questions, identified patterns, generated solution tips, and medical history integration effects.

quotes: Verification: पहले Backend console पर रिजल्ट्स देखें
Scope: पैटर्न, टिप्स और मेडिकल इंटीग्रेशन—सब कुछ एक साथ वेरीफाई करें।

acceptanceCriteria: Verification function exists that runs all three test profiles through the pattern analysis logic
Console logs show detected low-scoring questions for each profile
Console logs display identified health patterns for each profile
Console logs include generated Ayurvedic solution tips mapped to detected patterns
Console logs demonstrate medical history integration with appropriate additional tips for BP and Sugar conditions

requirements.text: Create a frontend Test Mode page accessible only for internal developer testing that displays all three test profiles with their complete analysis results including section scores, detected patterns, solution tips, and medical history effects in a visual format matching the existing results page design.

quotes: Test Mode: सिर्फ इंटरनल डेवलपर टेस्टिंग (Internal Only)।
Verification: फिर Frontend पर 'Test Mode' पेज बनाएं।

acceptanceCriteria: Test Mode page exists in frontend with route configuration
Page displays all three test profiles (Healthy, Moderate, Serious) side by side or in tabs
Each profile shows section scores with color-coded status indicators
Each profile displays detected patterns and solution tips using existing AnalysisCard components
Page clearly indicates it is for internal testing only
Visual presentation matches the design patterns of existing ResultsPage component

constraints: Use only 'BP' and 'Sugar' as medical history values, not full medical terms
Test Mode page must be internal-only and not accessible to regular users
Score patterns must be automatically generated based on profile type without manual entry of all 40 scores
Pattern analysis must use existing rule-based logic from patternAnalysis.ts
nonGoals: Creating user-facing test functionality or demo mode
Adding authentication or access control for test mode
Modifying existing pattern recognition rules or thresholds
